creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

The patch in the PR is corrupted: 

Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me... 
The text leading up to this was: 
-------------------------- 
|diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/hungarian/hunspell.orig/files/patch-src_tools_Makefile.am /usr/ports/hungarian/hunspell/files/patch-src_tools_Makefile.am 
|--- /usr/ports/hungarian/hunspell.orig/files/patch-src_tools_Makefile.am       2009-02-04 16:43:05.000000000 +0100 
|+++ /usr/ports/hungarian/hunspell/files/patch-src_tools_Makefile.am    2009-02-08 16:46:37.000000000 +0100 
-------------------------- 
Patching file patch-src_tools_Makefile.am using Plan A... 
Reversed (or previously applied) patch detected!  Assume -R? [y] 

It can slo be seen be the $FreeBSD$ keyword in the patch, it seems reversed. 
Could you please submit a correct patch?
